title: mentha × schultziana var. pyrenaica
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean peppermint, is a hybrid species of mint that is native to the Pyrenees mountains. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × schultziana var. pyrenaica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or added to food and drinks to harness its medicinal properties.
